intent: a portfolio site for an independent furniture maker working in solid walnut, based in Seoul

deltas: Restructure .project-card to use full-bleed images with 4:5 aspect ratio and narrow text rail beside them (not wrapped in borders), alternating text position per project (left/right), and ensure no decorative elements compete with the photography.

turn_log.delta: Restructure .project-card to use full-bleed images with 4:5 aspect ratio and narrow text rail beside them (not wrapped in borders), alternating text position per project (left/right), and ensure no decorative elements compete with the photography.
turn_log.rationale: The project cards lack the magazine-pacing structure specified in the editorial-portfolio scaffold, which requires full-bleed images with narrow text rail beside them, not grid layouts with borders.
